buildingDepartment.name: City of Walnut Creek Community Development Department — Building Division
buildingDepartment.address: 1666 North Main Street, Walnut Creek, CA 94596
buildingDepartment.digitalSubmittalNote: All applications submitted online only — no paper or email accepted

fireAgency.name: Contra Costa County Fire Protection District (Con Fire)
fireAgency.address: 4005 Port Chicago Highway, Suite 250, Concord, CA 94520
fireAgency.submitPath: Separate submission required — applicants submit directly to Con Fire; city building dept does not route to fire district
